name: avatar-cloud
title: Avatar Cloud
description: Lettermark avatars populate a loose elliptical cloud while fine SVG links draw between the community and its central proof label.

variables.label: Avatar count
variables.description: Number of lettermark avatars in the network cloud.

variables.label: Show links
variables.description: Show or hide the connecting network lines.

variables.label: Proof label
variables.description: Community proof copy shown in the center hub.
